name: smb-crm
description: A CRM for freelancers, SMBs, and non-profits on Cloudflare

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/workers & npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.db:init: cd database && wrangler d1 create smb-crm-db
scripts.db:migrate: cd database && wrangler d1 migrations apply smb-crm-db
scripts.db:backup: cd database && wrangler d1 backup smb-crm-db
